visual_vibe: Premium minimal, glassy, elegant, 3D motion-driven scrollytelling

grid.description: Asymmetrical, visually tense grids. Leave empty cells to act as negative space. Avoid standard boring equal-column arrays.

vault_card.classes: relative overflow-hidden bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl
vault_card.interaction: 3D tilt effect via Framer Motion, with a subtle mouse-tracked reflective gradient overlay (hologram effect).
elements: Artist Image (High contrast, greyscale or dark moody)

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
header.layout: Flex container, large padding, logo left, links center, CTA right.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-all backdrop-blur-md

scroll.usage: Smooth momentum scrolling for the vertical progression experience.

3d_effects.usage: Use Framer Motion for the 3D card tilt and hover effects. For the hero section, use Parallax scrolling (elements moving at different Y speeds).

animations.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (y: 20 -> y: 0) for elements as they enter the viewport.

image_urls.description: Dark moody concert portrait of a male artist in black, high contrast.
Artist singing and playing guitar on stage, dramatic lighting.
Abstract dark glass 3D render with subtle wavy lines, perfect for the immersive vertical scroll background.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over glass has sufficient contrast. Use text-shadow if necessary. Maintain minimum 4.5:1 ratio for body text.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion CSS media query. Disable heavy 3D tilts for these users.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='spot-artist-button').

instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Use raw Tailwind classes for custom layouts. Do not use plain Shadcn cards for the Vault Cards; build custom HTML with the glass classes provided.
instructions_to_main_agent.interactivity: Implement Framer Motion for the Vault Card tilt effects. The card should act like a physical trading card reflecting light based on mouse position.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout: Follow the 'Tetris Grid' pattern for the vault collection. Hero section must be a full 100vh immersive scene with a clear vertical scroll indicator.
instructions_to_main_agent.media: Use the provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com. Apply a subtle grayscale or high-contrast filter to artist images to match the luxury dark theme.
